violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -The listed certified food service manager is no longer employed and the current manager did not have proof of CFS certification and expiration.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Discovered a box of blue berry muffins in the food prep area that were uncovered and unprotected. When the plastic covering is removed recover following putting items out for display or transfer them to a container that will provide for protection.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
